name_cn:
🎉New Lunch Box Bag🎉1BC302🎉🎉
Those timeless design concepts of evergreen hits are reinterpreted in this minimalist modern mini bag. This accessory features a versatile design with adjustable handle and shoulder strap for multiple carrying ways. Its soft and lightweight shape is adorned with an enamel metal triangle logo, perfectly combining the practicality of Re-Nylon material with exquisite leather trim. Too perfect, get it now, another timeless hit🎉🎉
L20xH12xW11cm🎉🎉🎉💰💰💰
92698530
